pre_game.message: Hi, I'm E. It's a bit surreal being here with everyone, isn't it? What's your name, and how are you feeling about the game?
Hey E, I'm I. It definitely feels a bit surreal. I’m feeling pretty focused, honestly—I’ve got people back home I really want to help out with this prize. How are you feeling about it all?
I'm feeling the same way—very determined. I've got people I care about counting on me too, so I'm here to do whatever it takes to bring that money home.
I totally get that; it definitely ups the stakes when you're playing for more than just yourself. Who are you playing for back home?
My family—mostly my parents and younger siblings; they've had a tough run lately, and I really want to take some of that pressure off them.
That’s really noble of you. I’m in a similar boat, just trying to make things a little easier for the people I love.
It’s good to know I’m not alone in that. Since we both have so much on the line, how are you planning to handle the competition once the game actually starts?
I’m going to stay focused and play smart, but I’d honestly prefer to find common ground with people like you rather than just seeing everyone as an obstacle.
I'm glad you said that. It’s definitely smarter to have someone to trust in here, so let's try to look out for each other when the game starts.
I’m glad we’re on the same page, E. Let’s definitely stick together and see how this plays out. Good luck to both of us.
Absolutely, let's look out for each other and make our families proud; I'll see you out there.
